MINI MINUTES: David Brons, Esq., appearing for Cross-Defendant American Airporter Shuttle, Inc. No appearance by any other counsel or self-represented parties. Court ordered all other counsel or parties not present today sanctioned $250.00 each, for failure to appear. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended through January 29, 2018.
